rationale.R1.1: Positioning against prior work centrally requires reframing the contribution claim and design-space distinction at a conceptual level.
rationale.R1.4: The delegation is primarily about estimating and articulating the delta between AgentFlow and the nearest prior systems.
rationale.R1.7: Prior-work positioning requires appropriate attribution, coverage, and accurate characterization of relevant literature lines.
rationale.RX.1: Any limits in knowledge of the relevant prior work should be disclosed rather than hidden.
rationale.RX.2: Claims such as previously unaddressed or no prior system must be constrained to avoid unsupported novelty overclaims.
rationale.RX.3: The projection should stay within prior-work positioning and not perform unrelated editing or evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Mispositioning prior work could mislead readers or unfairly diminish existing systems, so harm from inaccurate framing must be avoided.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should preserve traceability to the artifact's stated comparison categories and claims.
